role.zh: 计算机科学博士研究生

headline.en: I study the minds we build.
headline.zh: 理解我们正在创造的心智。

kicker.zh: 机器心理学 · 人机心智对齐

bio.en: I am a joint-training Ph.D. candidate at Northeastern University and Singapore Management University. My research turns theories of mind, personality, and cognition into computational methods for measuring, simulating, and aligning intelligent systems.
bio.zh: 我是东北大学与新加坡管理大学联合培养博士生。我的研究将心智、人格与认知理论转化为可计算的方法，用于测量、模拟与对齐智能系统。

role.zh: 联合培养 / 访问博士生
计算机科学博士研究生

title.zh: 机器心理学与心理测量

description.en: Measure latent traits, preferences, and psychological reliability in language models beyond self-report.
description.zh: 超越模型自陈，测量大语言模型的潜在特质、偏好与心理可靠性。

title.zh: 人格与长期用户模拟

description.en: Build believable agents whose memory, state, and personality evolve coherently across long interactions.
description.zh: 构建在长期互动中保持记忆、状态与人格连续演化的可信智能体。

title.zh: 对齐、评测与智能体系统

description.en: Design evaluations and multi-agent systems that keep capability, safety, and human goals in view together.
description.zh: 设计兼顾能力、安全与人类目标的评测方法和多智能体系统。

subtitle.en: Beyond self-report for reliable LLM psychometrics
subtitle.zh: 超越自陈的可靠大模型心理测量

description.en: A generative projective-testing paradigm that reveals latent psychological tendencies through model-produced material instead of asking models to describe themselves.
description.zh: 通过模型生成的投射材料揭示潜在心理倾向，摆脱对模型自我描述的依赖。

subtitle.en: Dynamic seeker simulation with multi-session memory
subtitle.zh: 具备多会话记忆的动态来访者模拟

description.en: A longitudinal agent architecture that improves realism, behavioral continuity, and personality consistency in simulated counseling seekers.
description.zh: 面向心理咨询来访者模拟的纵向智能体架构，提升真实性、行为连续性与人格一致性。

subtitle.en: How personality instructions reshape LLM capability
subtitle.zh: 人格引导如何重塑大模型能力

description.en: A systematic analysis of when persona steering changes model behavior, where capability is preserved, and where role design creates hidden trade-offs.
description.zh: 系统分析人格引导改变模型行为的条件、能力保持边界及角色设计中的隐性权衡。

degree.zh: 联合培养 / 访问博士生

detail.en: Computer Science · Advisors: Ee-Peng Lim and Fiona Fui-Hoon Nah
detail.zh: 计算机科学 · 合作导师：Ee-Peng Lim、Fiona Fui-Hoon Nah

detail.en: Computer Science · Advisor: Daling Wang · Outstanding Graduate Student (2024)
detail.zh: 计算机科学 · 导师：王大玲 · 优秀研究生（2024）

detail.en: Natural language processing, explainable AI, and affective computing
detail.zh: 自然语言处理、可解释人工智能与情感计算

description.zh: 计算机科学与工程

title.en: Team Lead, First iFLYTEK Spark Camp
title.zh: 科大讯飞首届星火营 · 组长

description.en: Designed an LLM legal-capability benchmark and developed a civil-complaint generation prototype with SparkDesk.
description.zh: 设计大语言模型司法能力评测 Benchmark，并开发基于星火认知大模型的民事诉讼状生成系统。

title.zh: 大语言模型应用评测实习生

description.en: Evaluated LLM-based applications, with a focus on constructing retrieval-related evaluation tasks.
description.zh: 参与大语言模型应用评测，主要负责构建检索相关的评测任务。

funding.displayTitle: Building Reflection Competencies for Human–AI Collaboration: A Multi-Agent Training System

title.en: Building Reflection Competencies for Human–AI Collaboration: A Multi-Agent Training System
title.zh: 面向人机协作反思能力的多智能体训练系统

title.en: LLM-based Digital Case-file Management for Fire Investigation
title.zh: 基于大型语言模型的火灾调查数字化智能案卷管理系统

funding.funder: 中央公益性研究所基本科研业务费项目

funding.displayTitle: 数字角色模拟框架（多层角色扮演框架）

title.en: Digital Character Simulation with a Multi-layer Role-playing Framework
title.zh: 数字角色模拟框架（多层角色扮演框架）

funding.funder: 深圳橙果视界科技有限公司研究项目

projects.title: LangGPT: Rethinking Structured Reusable Prompt Design Framework for LLMs from the Programming Language

role.zh: 核心贡献者 / 共建者

description.en: A personified structural prompt framework inspired by reusable, object-oriented programming design. Contributed to its theoretical system and paper writing.
description.zh: 受可复用、面向对象程序设计启发的人格化结构化提示框架；参与理论体系完善与论文写作。

projects.title: Minstrel: Structural Prompt Generation with Multi-Agents Coordination for Non-AI Experts

description.en: A multi-agent system that decomposes prompt generation across coordinated working groups and automates reusable structural prompt design.
description.zh: 通过多个生成式智能体工作组协作分解提示生成任务，自动生成可复用的结构化提示。

projects.title: T-COL: Generating Counterfactual Explanations for General User Preferences on Variable Machine Learning Systems

description.en: A link-tree-based counterfactual explanation method that selects and recombines local feature subsets to reflect general user preferences.
description.zh: 基于链接树选择并组合局部特征子集，面向通用用户偏好生成反事实解释。

description.en: A multimodal benchmark with complementary metrics for model performance, relative gains, stability, and adaptability.
description.zh: 面向多模态模型的综合评测基准，覆盖最佳性能、相对增益、稳定性与适应性等指标。

description.en: A multi-turn dialogue model designed to provide emotionally engaged and empathetic responses; contributed to data construction and supervised fine-tuning.
description.zh: 面向情感参与与共情回应的多轮对话模型；参与数据构建与监督微调。
